items.content_html: Obsidian is a powerful, flexible note-taking app that uses markdown files to help organize and link your ideas. It excels in personal knowledge management, offering features like bidirectional linking, graph views, and plugins, making it ideal for creating a personal knowledge base.
items.title: natthasath/obsidian-plugin: Obsidian is a powerful, flexible note-taking app that uses markdown files to help organize and link your ideas. It excels in personal knowledge management, offering features like bidirectional linking, graph views, and plugins, making it ideal for creating a personal knowledge base.
